creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
(In reply to Christos Chatzaras from comment #23)

That appears to be an identical issue.

Run the ldd command from comment #2 and see if abseil has 'masked' MySQL's private library.

Don't expect a solution (other than remapping the library, as in comment #4), because apparently 'unable to reproduce' is the end-all to bug handling.
